title: From Agent Swarms to Agent Control Planes
thesis: Agent orchestration is shifting from hand-written workflows toward governed control planes that route across models, tools, memory, evaluators, policies, and execution environments, making routing, observability, and policy enforcement infrastructure concerns rather than per-agent code.

claims.claim: Agent orchestration is shifting from hand-written workflows toward governed control planes that route across models, tools, memory, evaluators, policies, and execution environments.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Mixture-of-Experts and conditional computation predate LLMs and provide the earliest architectural precedent for learned routing.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Learned routers such as FrugalGPT and RouteLLM can match or exceed single-model accuracy at a fraction of the cost, though benchmark caveats apply.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Test-time search strategies—self-consistency, Tree of Thoughts, Reflexion, and multi-agent debate—expand what a control plane can spend compute on at runtime.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Recent learned orchestrators such as Sakana Fugu, Trinity, and Conductor are signals of automated scaffold generation, not settled production recipes.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Production control planes combine routing, fallback, policy, memory, evaluation, observability, and lifecycle governance, but no single vendor owns all of them.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: The term 'control plane' is contested across vendors; teams should judge products by concrete capabilities rather than marketing labels.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer
Fedus et al., Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
Dohan et al., Language Model Cascades

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Teams should treat model selection, fallback, observability, and policy enforcement as infrastructure concerns rather than per-agent code.

evidence.snippet: Shazeer et al., Outrageously Large Neural Networks: The Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer

Treat maturity=contested as an explicit uncertainty marker.
Do not present speculative claims as settled facts.
